releases.author: JichouP
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ♻️ Pass the state using `setViewState` by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/8
* ✨ use resourceUrl to preview and base64 to export by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/11
* ✨ use path.normalize by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/12
* 🐛 decode entity for inline comment by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/13
* 🐛 mkdir before writeFile by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/14
* ✨ set default themeDir to `MarpTheme` and ✨ access themeDir before export by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/15
* 📝 add mention for embedding images and installing Node.js by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/16


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: JichouP
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ♻️ change command id from `marp-open-preview` to `open-preview` by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/2
* ⚡️ move `registerEvent` to PreviewView by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/4
* ✨ use viewState to hold TFile in PreviewView by @JichouP in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @JichouP made their first contribution in https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JichouP/obsidian-marp-plugin/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
